signals.headline: **Cooper Flagg's historic performances**: The Mavericks rookie scored 51 points vs
signals.raw: **Cooper Flagg's historic performances**: The Mavericks rookie scored 51 points vs. Orlando (April 3) and 45 points vs. Lakers (April 5), totaling 96 points in back-to-back games—the most by a rookie since Wilt Chamberlain—and ending Dallas's 14-game home losing streak (25-53 record).[1][2][3][4]
